meta.notes: Read-only research log. No trades are ever placed by this routine.

catalyst.name: Phase 3 REGAL trial (Galinpepimut-S, AML) - event-driven unblind
catalyst.status: 78 of 80 required events reported as of company's May 11, 2026 update; final analysis triggers on 80th event; topline readout guided for 2H 2026
catalyst.next_check: watch for 8-K / press release announcing 80th event

positions.risk_flag: OVER_CONCENTRATED - 69.8% of NAV vs 35% trim threshold

catalyst.name: $25B investment-grade bond deal (priced late Jun/early Jul 2026, $89B demand, proceeds retired bridge loan) + staggered IPO lockup
catalyst.status: First lockup tranche (20% of 180-day block) unlocks 2nd full trading day after Q2 2026 earnings, expected late Jul/early Aug 2026; further 7% tranches Aug-Oct; full lockup expires Dec 8 2026
catalyst.next_check: Q2 2026 earnings date announcement; stock reaction into lockup

positions.risk_flag: WATCH - within cap but second-largest single-name risk; lockup supply event ~2-3 weeks out

flags: SLS at 69.8% of NAV is nearly double the 35% single-name trim threshold, in a pre-binary-catalyst biotech with no news that breaks the thesis but no catalyst confirmation either.
Zero USD cash buffer - account fully invested, no dry powder to add on weakness (not on margin, so no forced-liquidation risk).
SPCX facing its first staggered lockup unlock in ~2-3 weeks; stock already down 4-5% pre-market with no negative credit news (bond was oversubscribed, investment-grade).

catalyst.name: Phase 3 REGAL trial (Galinpepimut-S, AML) - event-driven unblind
catalyst.status: Still 78 of 80 required events as of the company's last public update (May 11, 2026); no 8-K or press release announcing the 80th event found overnight. Topline readout still guided for 2H 2026.
catalyst.next_check: watch for 8-K / press release announcing 80th event; quiet period begins once announced

positions.risk_flag: OVER_CONCENTRATED - 71.8% of NAV vs 35% trim threshold, worse than last run's 69.8%. Trim ~35.4 shares to reach 35% NAV at current mark.
positions.data_quality_note: IBKR live snapshot/price history shows ~$12.8-12.9 (thin premarket volume, 2,590 shares). Some web sources (Benzinga, generic finance aggregators) showed stale/conflicting quotes near $13.30-$16 - not corroborated by the broker feed and not used for sizing math.

catalyst.name: $25B investment-grade bond deal (closed, proceeds retired $20B xAI-linked bridge loan) + staggered IPO lockup
catalyst.status: First lockup tranche (~20% of the 180-day block, up to ~30% if stock is 30%+ above the $135 IPO price) unlocks the 2nd trading day after Q2 2026 earnings, expected late July 2026. Stock down further since last run (-7.1%) on lockup overhang, though bond was oversubscribed ($89B demand) and investment-grade with no fresh credit negative news overnight.
catalyst.next_check: Q2 2026 earnings date confirmation; stock reaction into the lockup window

positions.risk_flag: WATCH - within cap (28.6% NAV, down from 30.1%); lockup unlock now the nearest-dated catalyst risk (~2-3 weeks).

flags: SLS concentration WORSENED run-over-run: 71.8% of NAV vs 69.8% five days ago, still no catalyst resolution (80th REGAL event not yet announced) - risk is compounding while account waits.
Zero USD cash buffer persists - no dry powder to average down or rebalance without selling an existing position.

SPCX down another 7.1% since last run heading into its first lockup tranche (expected ~late July, post-Q2 earnings) - no new negative catalyst found, move looks like lockup-overhang positioning rather than fundamental news.

Total account unrealized P&L is -194.37 USD (-15.4% of cost basis), and NAV (base) drifted from 1,079.73 to 1,079.19 EUR since last run - roughly flat in EUR terms despite two single-digit-to-teens USD moves, due to USD/EUR offsetting.
